elements.text: You arrange to meet your date at 8 p.m. at a local bar. You arrive on time and find that your date is not there yet. Reflecting on your last conversation as you wait for a table, you remember that your date found you...

elements.name: new_meetup_--romantic_relationships--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
